name: treasuryutils-consumer
description: Decision matrix and module API references for engineers using treasuryutils in their own codebases, guided setup workflows for source bindings, authentication profiles, and dataset-contract authoring (each driving deterministic doctor / scaffold / validate tooling), and a SessionStart hook that surfaces treasuryutils — plus, for projects that depend on it, the current data-environment readiness (which datasets are bound, their auth, and what is materialized) from env-memory — when a project already uses it or plausibly fits it.
